assertions.description: All 41 components are correctly identified with accurate references, values, footprints, MPNs, and categories. The 33 non-DNP in-BOM components match the sourcing_audit total of 32 (J6 test point is not in BOM). USB D+/D- differential pair is correctly detected with J1 and U1. CC1/CC2 5.1K pulldown resistors (R3, R4) are correctly identified and the cc1_pulldown_5k1 and cc2_pulldown_5k1 USB compliance checks pass. Voltage dividers (R5/R6 for bus monitoring, R8/R11 for ADC reference) are correctly detected. UART signals (TXD, RXD, BUS_TX) on U1 correctly identified. Q1 (BC817) NPN transistor driving the +24V Bus rail is correctly characterized as a switch-mode circuit.

The warnings correctly flag that SSR, LED_RED, LED_RGB, and BUS_TX have both 'input' and 'output' shaped global labels (inconsistent direction annotations), and that BUS_WIRE1 and BUS_WIRE2 have input-shaped labels but no driver pins — these are inter-board signals routed through the connector J2 without a local driver, which is accurate for this gateway design.
